image_prompts.image_prompt: Create a realistic Korean Instagram card news image. Topic: AI content automation. Slide message: 1장: 문제 제기. Style: clean, modern, high readability, social media optimized, professional editorial design, 1:1 square ratio, no text inside image.
image_prompts.negative_prompt: blurry, low quality, distorted face, broken hands, unreadable text, watermark, logo, messy layout, excessive details
